name: Glassmorphism
description: Frosted glass effect with transparency and blur creating depth and layered interfaces.

name: Bento Grid
description: Grid-based layout inspired by Japanese bento boxes with varied card sizes creating visual hierarchy.

name: Aurora UI
description: Subtle animated gradient backgrounds mimicking northern lights with soft color transitions.

name: Mesh Gradient
description: Complex multi-point gradient meshes creating organic color blends as backgrounds and accents.

name: AI Native
description: Design language built around AI interactions with streaming text and conversational UI.

name: Floating UI
description: Elevated card-based design with prominent shadows and floating elements creating depth perception.

name: Gradient Blur
description: Blurred gradient backgrounds with crisp foreground content for striking visual contrast.

name: Frosted Layers
description: Multiple stacked translucent layers with varying blur levels creating dimensional interfaces.

name: Neon Glow
description: Dark backgrounds with vibrant neon-colored elements featuring glow effects and light bleeding.

name: Holographic
description: Iridescent rainbow shimmer effects mimicking holographic materials with angle-dependent color shifts.

name: Kinetic Typography
description: Typography-driven design where text itself is the primary visual element with motion and scale.

name: Parallax Depth
description: Multi-layer scrolling with different speeds creating immersive depth and spatial experiences.

name: Morphing Shapes
description: Organic blob-like shapes that animate and morph creating dynamic fluid backgrounds.

name: Liquid Design
description: Fluid responsive layouts with smooth transitions and water-like motion effects throughout.

name: 3D Cards
description: Card components with perspective transforms and hover-triggered 3D rotation effects.

name: Minimalism
description: Stripped-down design focusing on essential elements with maximum whitespace and restrained color.

name: Swiss Design
description: International typographic style with strong grids mathematical precision and sans-serif type.

name: Corporate Clean
description: Professional polished design with clear hierarchy neutral colors and trustworthy appearance.

name: Flat Design
description: Two-dimensional design without shadows or gradients using bold colors and simple shapes.

name: Material Design
description: Google's design system with subtle shadows elevation layers and meaningful motion.

name: Monochrome
description: Single-color palette design using only shades tints and tones of one hue for sophisticated unity.

name: Whitespace Heavy
description: Design dominated by generous whitespace letting content breathe with ample padding and margins.

name: Strict Grid
description: Rigid grid-based layout with mathematical precision and consistent spacing throughout.

name: Typographic
description: Typography-first design where typeface selection size and spacing drive the entire visual system.

name: Editorial Clean
description: Clean publication-style design with clear reading hierarchy and refined serif typography.

name: Scandinavian
description: Nordic-inspired design with natural tones soft curves functional simplicity and warmth.

name: Japanese Minimal
description: Wabi-sabi inspired design with asymmetric balance natural textures and reverence for emptiness.

name: Brutalism
description: Raw unpolished web design with bold typography harsh colors and intentionally crude aesthetics.

name: Maximalism
description: More-is-more approach with layered textures rich colors mixed patterns and visual abundance.

name: Cyberpunk
description: Futuristic dystopian aesthetic with neon accents on dark backgrounds glitch effects and tech motifs.

name: Vaporwave
description: Retro-internet aesthetic with pastel gradients roman busts pixel art and 80s/90s nostalgia.

name: Retro Futurism
description: Past visions of the future combining vintage aesthetics with futuristic optimism and chrome.

name: Memphis
description: 1980s Italian design movement with bold geometric shapes primary colors squiggles and patterns.

name: Pop Art
description: Warhol-inspired design with bold outlines halftone dots primary colors and comic-book energy.

name: Grunge
description: Distressed worn textures with rough edges torn paper effects and underground aesthetic.

name: Glitch Art
description: Digital corruption aesthetic with RGB splitting distortion artifacts and broken visual effects.

name: Neon Brutalism
description: Brutalist foundations with neon color accents combining raw structure with electric vibrancy.

name: Anti-Design
description: Deliberately breaking design conventions with clashing elements misalignment and visual chaos.

name: Acid Graphics
description: Rave culture inspired visuals with warped typography chromatic aberration and psychedelic motifs.

name: Y2K Aesthetic
description: Year 2000 digital nostalgia with chrome effects bubble shapes translucency and techno-optimism.

name: Psychedelic
description: Mind-bending visuals with swirling patterns extreme color saturation and optical illusions.

name: Punk
description: DIY cut-and-paste aesthetic with ransom-note typography safety pins and rebellious energy.

name: Neumorphism
description: Soft extruded UI elements that appear to push out from the background using subtle shadow pairs.

name: Claymorphism
description: 3D clay-like UI elements with inflated appearance inner shadows and playful dimensional quality.

name: Organic
description: Natural freeform shapes with earth-tone palettes irregular curves and nature-derived patterns.

name: Pastel Dream
description: Soft muted color palette with gentle gradients and dreamy light-filled atmosphere.

name: Watercolor
description: Paint-bleed effects with soft edges color washes and artistic hand-painted quality.

name: Soft Gradient
description: Gentle subtle gradients with smooth color transitions creating calm and approachable interfaces.

name: Rounded Friendly
description: Extra-rounded corners and circular elements creating playful approachable and warm interfaces.

name: Cotton Candy
description: Ultra-soft pink and blue palette with fluffy cloud-like elements and whimsical lightness.

name: Nature Inspired
description: Design drawing from natural elements with earth tones leaf shapes and organic textures.

name: Hand Drawn
description: Sketch-like quality with wobbly lines imperfect shapes and illustration-driven visual language.

name: Warm Earth
description: Rich earth-toned palette with terracotta amber and olive creating grounded warm aesthetics.

name: Cozy Comfort
description: Warm inviting design evoking comfort with soft textures rounded shapes and homey color palettes.

name: Skeuomorphism
description: Real-world material mimicry with realistic textures shadows gradients and physical metaphors.

name: Editorial Magazine
description: Magazine-style layout with dramatic typography pull quotes and sophisticated image treatment.

name: Dashboard Dense
description: Information-rich interfaces optimized for data density with compact spacing and efficient layouts.

name: Data Viz First
description: Design centered around data visualization with chart-optimized layouts and analytical color schemes.

name: Terminal Hacker
description: Command-line inspired interface with monospace fonts dark backgrounds and green-on-black text.

name: Retro Pixel
description: 8-bit and 16-bit gaming aesthetic with pixel art chunky pixels and nostalgic game interfaces.

name: Luxury Minimal
description: High-end minimalism with premium feel using gold accents fine typography and lavish whitespace.

name: Dark Mode First
description: Design built primarily for dark backgrounds with optimized contrast and reduced eye strain.

name: Accessibility First
description: WCAG AAA compliant design with high contrast clear focus states and screen-reader optimized markup.

name: High Contrast
description: Maximum contrast design with stark black-white palette and bold color accents for visibility.

name: Newspaper
description: Traditional broadsheet layout with multi-column text serif headlines and ruled dividers.

name: Blueprint
description: Technical drawing aesthetic with grid backgrounds cyan-on-blue palette and engineering precision.

name: Wireframe Live
description: Functional interface styled as a living wireframe with sketch-like borders and placeholder aesthetics.
